utterance: everything that goes wrong feels like it's my fault, even when it clearly isn't

I've stopped doing the things I used to enjoy and feel completely stuck
my worries run all day and I can't seem to switch them off
I lie awake for hours every night and can't fall asleep
I want to understand why my body reacts the way it does when I get anxious
I want to understand what depression actually is and why I feel this way
I lost my father recently and I don't know how to cope with the emptiness
I always give everything in my relationships and never get what I need back
I want to learn to set boundaries with my family without feeling guilty
part of me wants to get better and part of me doesn't see the point
I want to stop letting fear make all my decisions for me
I can't stop stressing about money and whether I'll make rent this month
I'm so hard on myself and I want to learn to be kinder to myself
I carry so much tension in my shoulders and want to release it
I'm not sure what I'm feeling lately and want to take stock of where I am
I get so angry I say things I regret, and I want to manage my temper
